description: A graphic built on a close-up booking-style photograph of a man with short dark hair and a thin mustache and goatee, wearing a dark top, in an indoor office setting. A red tab at the upper right reads NEWARK, NJ. Light-blue text across the bottom reads ARRESTED and FACING REMOVAL, beside the Department of Homeland Security seal and the word ICE.
notable_text: NEWARK, NJ; ARRESTED; FACING REMOVAL; ICE
